name: hadf-phase3a-sensing
primary_metric: Sensing-layer coverage: per-endpoint reference distributions materialized + drift monitor operational over all closed Phase 2-bis endpoints (detection only).
success_metrics: reference-signatures.json built from closed Sub-exp 1/2/3/1B raw (>= 8 endpoints, all with n >= min_n)
attestation correctly maps each endpoint's centroid back to that endpoint (aggregate-level)
drift monitor distinguishes stable vs >3-sigma-shifted windows against the locked baseline
kill_criteria: Attestation presented as authoritative per-request (violates RQ5 honesty boundary) -> revert T2 to advisory-only or pull it.
Any T1-T3 producer makes a dispatch/routing decision (violates Phase 3A non-goal; acting is gated on RQ4 / Phase 3B).
kill_criteria_resolution: Not yet at closure (current_phase=implementation). T1-T3 ship advisory/detection-only by construction (every attestation output carries advisory:true + a 'do NOT route' caveat; no producer reads or writes a dispatch decision). Closure deferred until T4 control-room panel + T5 AIOrchestrator-hook decisions are made.
related_prs_notes: FT2 sensing producers PR (this branch). T4 control-room panel is a fitme-story-side follow-on; T5 AIOrchestrator emit hook is a deferred high-risk-area follow-on.

tasks.summary: reference-store builder + reference-signatures.json (8 endpoints, 7197 valid records, min_n=50, max_ttft=30s)
attestation classifier — Mahalanobis + confidence band (strong/weak/uncertain), advisory-only
drift monitor — Mahalanobis mean-shift + KS vs locked baseline -> drift-monitor.jsonl
control-room HADF panel (fitme-story) — shipped via fitme-story PR #207; advisory observability surface, W16 producer-schema-pinned loader

AIOrchestrator emit hook — T5a shipped: honest ai_inference_completed (duration_ms + source_tier), descoped per t4-t5-risk-assessment.md (ttft/tps not client-capturable); 3 emit tests pass, build green
server-side real ttft_s/tps + provider/model — requires AIEngineClient streaming rewrite + Railway contract; backlog sibling to F-AUTH-LATENCY-SERVER-METRIC (per risk assessment R4)

research.note: Phase 2-bis (all 4 sub-exps PASS) is the research substrate; sensing layer needs no new research.

prd.skip_reason: work_subtype:b_medium — sensing producers are mechanical materialization of a locked spec (2026-06-02 Phase 3A design); state.json + spec + sibling case study suffice.

ux_or_integration.skip_reason: work_subtype:b_medium — no user-visible surface in T1-T3 (panel is T4, fitme-story).

implement.note: T1-T3 + tests done on this branch; T4/T5 deferred.

phase_status_note: Phase 3A is the activate-now (sensing/observability) half of HADF Phase 3. Detection only — no dispatch decisions; the acting/routing layer is pre-registered as RQ4 (Phase 3B), a separate spec. T1-T3 producers + 9 tests shipped this PR; T4 panel + T5 emit-hook deferred.

factors_applied: architectural_novelty: +0.2 (first framework sensing layer — reference store + attestation + drift monitor per PR #635 T1-T3)
is_first_of_kind: +0.1 (no prior FT2 sensing infrastructure; predecessor was HADF behavioral measurement only)
predecessor_dependence: +0.1 (extends HADF Phase 2-bis cross-sub-exp synthesis behavioral models)
complexity.presence_only_note: Populated by helper-agent 2026-06-05 to clear MISSING_CU_V2 gate while feature is in-flight (T4+T5 still pending). Factor values are conservative-plausible; the implementing agent may refine at feature closure. Per CLAUDE.md Known Mechanical Limits #2, the gate checks presence not magnitude.
